task_completion.description: Open the target FITS file in AstroImageJ
task_completion.visual_evidence: AstroImageJ application window is open and displaying an image with the window title or image metadata indicating 'uit_galaxy_sample.fits'.

task_completion.description: Create a custom ROI around the central galaxy and measure Area and Integrated Density
task_completion.visual_evidence: A selection outline (ROI) tightly encompassing the central bright galaxy in the image window, and an AstroImageJ 'Results' window showing populated columns for 'Area' and 'IntDen' (Integrated Density).

task_completion.description: Create a source-free background ROI and measure the Mean gray value
task_completion.visual_evidence: A selection outline (ROI) in a dark, empty region of the image (away from the central galaxy), and the AstroImageJ 'Results' window showing a new row with a populated 'Mean' column.

task_completion.description: Save the measurement results to roi_measurements.csv
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog in AstroImageJ pointing to ~/AstroImages/measurements/roi_measurements.csv, or a file manager/terminal window showing the roi_measurements.csv file exists in the correct directory.

task_completion.description: Create flux_report.txt with the required keys
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of ~/AstroImages/measurements/flux_report.txt containing exactly the keys: GALAXY_AREA, GALAXY_INTDEN, BACKGROUND_MEAN, and NET_FLUX.

task_completion.description: Calculate and record the correct numeric values in the flux report
task_completion.visual_evidence: The flux_report.txt file shows numeric values assigned to the keys. The NET_FLUX value must be calculated as Galaxy_IntDen - (Background_Mean * Galaxy_Area). The values should roughly align with the ground truth (Area ~142,610, IntDen ~1.81e-10, Background ~0.00, Net Flux ~1.81e-10).

integrity.description: The agent used the AstroImageJ GUI to perform the measurements
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the AstroImageJ graphical interface (drawing tools, menus, Results window) rather than using a Python script or terminal commands to bypass the application.

integrity.description: The reported values match the actual measurements taken in the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The values entered into flux_report.txt correspond to the numbers visible in the AstroImageJ 'Results' window, proving they were derived from the agent's actual ROI selections.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply guess or hardcode the final answers
integrity.visual_evidence: There is a clear progression of opening the image, making selections, and generating results before the final text file is created.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: uit_galaxy_sample.fits. Output CSV path: /home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/roi_measurements.csv. Output TXT path: /home/ga/AstroImages/measurements/flux_report.txt. Ground truth approximations for verification: Galaxy Area is roughly 142,610 pixels, Integrated Density is roughly 1.81e-10, Background Mean is roughly 0.00, and Net Flux is roughly 1.81e-10. The exact numbers will vary slightly based on the agent's manual ROI drawing, but should be in this ballpark.
